hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-black
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

rules: No generic sans-serif (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.

colors.archetype: ARCHETYPE 4: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST (Authority, Clarity, Truth) adapted for modern editorial.
rules: Use #F7F7F8 (Off-white) for background to reduce eye strain for reading.
Deep Red (#C8102E) reserved for breaking news, critical alerts, and primary CTAs.
Charcoal (#1A1A1A) for primary text to avoid harsh pure black.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 with 1px border-white/40 and shadow-sm. NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds.
surface_strategies.cards: Bento Grid style: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-border), no default shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.dashboard: Technical Look: border-collapse style layout, subtle borders on right and bottom of grid items.

general: Generous spacing: Use p-6, p-8, p-12 extensively.
layouts.marketing_editorial: Bento grids, asymmetric blocks for home page. Anti-grid flowing layouts for articles with oversized typography and floating minimalism.
layouts.dashboard: F-Pattern scanning: Top-left most critical metrics, progressive disclosure (show 5-9 items), left-sidebar navigation.
layouts.grid_technical: Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers. Overide stretch with align-items: start.

rules: Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus).
DO NOT use universal transition (`transition: all`). Target specific properties like `transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease`.
Staggered entrance animations for news lists.

general: Do not use native HTML elements for complex interactions (dropdowns, calendars). Use Shadcn UI primitives.
Override hardcoded dimensions in Shadcn if they break layout (e.g. h-9 to h-auto).
Buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp corners based on context. Add interaction animations.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is FORBIDDEN).

rules: Normal text: Min 4.5:1 contrast. Large text: Min 3:1.
Explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., `hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white`).
Ensure focus states have higher contrast.

images.description: brown cow on green grass field near green trees and mountains
images.category: Himachal Pradesh Landscape / About Us / Hero Banner

images.description: white and brown concrete building near green trees (Shimla)
brown and white concrete buildings (Shimla architecture)
A news paper with the word news on it

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON and implement exact colors in src/index.css as HSL variables matching the provided HEX colors.
Install `lucide-react` for icons if not already present.
Do not build generic components. Build custom layout components (e.g. BentoCard, NewsHero) applying glassmorphism and subtle borders.
Apply `data-testid` to all navigational elements, form inputs, buttons, and important UI anchors.
For the admin dashboard, create a separate Layout with a left sidebar using Shadcn components (Table, Dialog, Form) and a clean F-pattern.
Replace `.App { text-align: center; }` with empty styles in App.css.
For Typography, load 'Playfair Display' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts in public/index.html.
Ensure 'Live Point News' feels like a premium, trustworthy entity. Space things out using p-6 or p-8 inside news cards.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky navs and tooltips.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Target explicit properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖, etc).
